generated_oml:
instance HokuyoUST10LX : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor for raw point cloud data acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RawLiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDeepsenseD435i : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Depth camera for raw depth image acquisition"
    DTDFVocab:producedData RawDepthImage
]

instance RawLiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST10LX
]

instance RawDepthImage : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDeepsenseD435i
]

instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electronic speed controller for propulsion control interfacing with DC motor"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering servo for directional adjustment"
]

instance ActuationSoftware : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Software that converts desired speed commands into precise motor voltage signals to control vehicle dynamics"
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonNX : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Edge computing hardware for digital twin system"
]

instance NVIDIAJetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Edge computing hardware for digital twin system"
]

instance ROS2 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Middleware framework for communication"
]

instance NVIDIAJetpack50 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "GPU acceleration software platform"
]

instance Python : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Programming language for application development"
]

instance CPlusPlus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Programming language for application development"
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Modeling and simulation tool"
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving path, and detected object tracks, with capabilities to save and generate reports"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVehicleStateVisualization, ProjectedDrivingPathVisualization, DetectedObjectTracksVisualization, ReportGeneration
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for offloading ACC system computation (lead vehicle detection, speed computation based on distance, and actuation commands) to cloud-based resources to alleviate on-board ECU constraints"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionResult, FollowingSpeedComputation, ActuationCommand
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service allowing operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, and send emergency braking commands through the UI"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACC, DisableACC, SetDesiredSpeed, SendEmergencyBrakingCommand
]

instance RealTimeVehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data"
]

instance ProjectedDrivingPathVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of projected driving path"
]

instance DetectedObjectTracksVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of detected object tracks"
]

instance ReportGeneration : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Generation of reports for analysis and visualization"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionResult : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Result of lead vehicle detection for ACC"
]

instance FollowingSpeedComputation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Computation of following speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]

instance ActuationCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command for actuation to control vehicle dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to enable Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DisableACC : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to disable Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to set desired speed for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SendEmergencyBrakingCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Command to send emergency braking"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model for processing raw LiDAR point clouds using DBSCAN clustering followed by Kalman filter tracking"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler
]

instance ACCModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model for determining lead vehicle position and computing following speed for ACC"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCEnabler
]

instance StructuredTrackData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured track data of detected objects after clustering and tracking"
    DTDFVocab:fromData RawLiDARPointCloudData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "State data of the ego vehicle (e.g., speed, position, orientation)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SQLDatabase
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationComponent
]

instance SQLDatabase : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SQL database for storing object tracks and ego vehicle state"
    DTDFVocab:enables ReportGenerationEnabler
]

instance ReportGenerationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Component for generating reports for visualization and analysis"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Software component for Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Software component for Adaptive Cruise Control"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance DataTranslationComponent : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Component that serializes all data streams, aligns message types, and performs unit conversions"
    DTDFVocab:enables ROS2
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Entity in the digital twin architecture"
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital Twin Entity in the digital twin architecture"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical Twin Entity in the digital twin architecture"
]

instance UserInterfaceFE : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User Interface Functional Entity implemented as ROS2 package"
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D Visualization subcomponent of User Interface FE"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control Panel subcomponent of User Interface FE"
]

instance PhysicalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwinEntity, PointCloudClusteringTrackingEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "ACC-related control commands for motor and steering actuators are processed through the ACC Controlling FE and Actuation FE components. Data Translation serializes control signals, aligns message formats, and performs unit conversions before transmission via ROS2 for internal component communication and UDP over Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Clock synchronization requirement of 100 ms accuracy for computation offloading in safety-critical vehicular applications, mandated by industry standards and constrained by hardware limitations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 Reference Architecture (RA) used for design, mapping software components to Functional Entities (FEs) implemented as ROS2 packages on vehicle hardware; entity structure includes User Entity (3D Visualization, Control Panel), Digital Twin Entity (data management, control mechanisms), Physical Twin Entity (sensors, actuators, Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking), each on separate hardware."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Internal communication between software components uses ROS2, while inter-entity communication occurs over Wi-Fi. Requirement R7 specifies a maximum network latency of 100 ms. Bandwidth requirements, redundancy mechanisms, and security protocols are not explicitly detailed in the documents."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Each entity is deployed on separate hardware components, including NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano. Data storage is maintained on a device external to the vehicle as per Requirement R3. Computational requirements, scalability mechanisms, and deployment models are not explicitly detailed beyond these specifics."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The ISO 23247 standard for Digital Twin framework in manufacturing specifies a reference architecture in Part 2, consisting of Observable Manufacturing Element (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Functional Entities (FEs) within this architecture may implement OPC Unified Architecture for data collection and device control."
]
